latest_news.headline: IRGC claims strikes on Kuwait and UAE air bases - ballistic missiles + suicide drones
latest_news.text: IRGC Navy commander Tangsiri claims 'pounded' Al-Minhad (UAE) and Ali Al-Salem (Kuwait) air bases with massive ballistic missile + suicide drone barrage. Says bases were 'origin of aggression' against Iran. UAE air defenses actively responding.

latest_news.headline: UAE air defenses responding to active missile threat
latest_news.text: UAE National Emergency Crisis and Disaster Management Authority confirms air defenses responding to missile threat. Tells residents to remain in safe locations. Direct threat to UAE territory escalates.

latest_news.headline: Putin tells Iran Moscow remains 'loyal friend and reliable partner'
latest_news.text: Putin's Nowruz message to new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei and President Pezeshkian: Moscow remains 'loyal friend and reliable partner to Tehran during this difficult time.' Major geopolitical alignment signal.

latest_news.headline: UK Foreign Secretary: Iran strikes on Gulf 'reckless' - wants 'swift resolution'
latest_news.text: UK Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper calls Iran's Gulf strikes 'reckless', says UK wants 'swift resolution' and regional stability. Reiterates UK will offer defensive support but 'will not be drawn into wider conflict.'

latest_news.headline: Trump: Strait of Hormuz must be protected 'by other nations who use it'
latest_news.text: Trump says Hormuz protection should fall on 'other nations who use it' - further evidence of US disengagement from coalition-building for Hormuz. Pushes burden to Asian/European importers.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: Monitoring. Israel strikes in Sweida province Syria continue. Potential for separate tracker if escalation widens.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 77% (up). Day 20 auto - % (up). Day 22 Hour 19 - IMMINENT. 7 neighborhoods warned in Beirut suburbs. Central Beirut strike kills 10. 12 medical workers killed in Hezbollah health center strike. Ground ops continue south Lebanon. Hezbollah resistance stiffening but IDF advancing on multiple axes. Updated 2026-03-21T19:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut - 7 neighborhoods evacuated
latest_news.text: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut early Saturday. Evacuation warnings for 7 neighborhoods in southern suburbs. Jets bombed Beirut at 3am. Ghandouriyeh house strike kills 1, wounds 2.

latest_news.headline: WaPo: Israel strikes Hezbollah health center, kills 12 medical workers
latest_news.text: Israeli strike hit Hezbollah-run health center in southern Lebanon, killed 12 medical workers. Israel widens campaign beyond fighters to civilian infrastructure.

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

latest_news.headline: Putin's forces suffer DEADLIEST day of 2026 - 1,610 killed in 24h
latest_news.text: Russian forces suffer deadliest day of 2026: 1,610 killed in past 24 hours. Total Russian casualties since Feb 2022 now approximately 1,285,700. Fighting intense despite peace talk pauses.

latest_news.headline: Ukrainian drone swarms target Moscow overnight
latest_news.text: Swarms of Ukrainian drones targeted Moscow overnight, mayor confirms. Russian air defense intercepted attacks. Continued deep-strike capability demonstration.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 35% (stable). Day 22 Hour 20 - CRITICAL. Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding but Taliban claims Pakistan breached with 72 rockets on Kunar. India sends medical aid to Kabul, MEA calls strikes 'a massacre dressed as military operation' - major India-Pakistan tension signal. TTP separate truce. Post-Eid resumption feared by Mar 23. latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 18. DE-ESCALATION: Trump rhetoric winding down. Treasury lifts oil sanctions. Iran allows Japanese ships Hormuz. IAEA confirms no radiation at Natanz. Eid ceasefire Pakistan-Afghanistan. ESCALATION: 8000+ targets struck per CENTCOM. Iran fires at Diego Garcia (2370 miles from Iran). IRGC massive strikes UAE/Kuwait air bases. USS Boxer Marines deploying. 12 medical workers killed in Lebanon. Central Beirut strike kills 10. Russia preparing Spring-Summer offensive. Brent >$110. NET: War intensifying despite wind-down rhetoric. Iran demonstrates global strike capability.

latest_news.headline: Iran war enters 4th week - Iranian attacks down 90% per DoD
latest_news.text: DoD reports Iranian missile and drone attacks down 90% from early war days. US using Apache/A-10 close air support. CENTCOM: 8,000+ targets struck. Trump says considering 'winding down' operations. But 4th week begins with no ceasefire framework.

latest_news.headline: India sends emergency medical aid to Kabul, condemns Pakistan strikes
latest_news.text: India sends 2.5 tonnes of medical aid to Kabul after Pakistan airstrike. MEA calls it 'a blatant assault on Afghanistan's sovereignty.' Pakistan tries to 'dress up a massacre as military operation.' Major India-Pakistan diplomatic friction.

latest_news.headline: Putin calls Iran 'loyal friend and reliable partner' to new Supreme Leader
latest_news.text: Putin Nowruz message to Mojtaba Khamenei and President Pezeshkian: Moscow remains 'loyal friend and reliable partner to Tehran during this difficult time.' Major geopolitical alignment signal amid Iran war.

outlook: IMMINENT (Day 22, 20:04 UTC) - 4th week. Iranian attacks DOWN 90% per DoD but no ceasefire. CENTCOM: 8,000+ targets struck. US using Apache/A-10. Trump 'winding down' rhetoric. Treasury lifts oil sanctions. Natanz struck, IAEA confirms no radiation. 3,000+ vessels stranded at Hormuz. Putin calls Iran 'loyal friend'. India-Pakistan diplomatic friction over Afghanistan strikes. Updated 2026-03-21T20:04:00Z

de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 20. DE-ESCALATION: Iranian attacks down 90% (DoD). Trump 'winding down' rhetoric. Treasury lifts oil sanctions. Iran allows Japanese ships Hormuz. IAEA no radiation Natanz. Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire through Mar 23. ESCALATION: 4th week no end in sight, IDF strikes Tehran overnight. 3000+ vessels stranded. Putin calls Iran 'loyal friend'. India condemns Pakistan strikes as 'massacre'. Russia Spring-Summer offensive prep. NET: Iranian military degraded but no ceasefire. Combat intensity undiminished. Regional proxy tensions rising (India-Pakistan friction, Russia alignment).
